design_philosophy: Trust-building minimalism with high-end editorial touches. Eschewing the generic 'SaaS card' look for flat, crisp bento-grids with generous internal padding and optical clarity. Data acts as the hero, framed by deliberate negative space.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (gap-6, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4)

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces with a delicate 1px border. Do not use generic Shadcn cards out of the box; strip the heavy drop shadows and increase border-radius to 2xl. Increase internal padding to p-6 or p-8.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-xl px-6 py-2.5 transition-all

inputs.style: Shadcn standard but override radius to rounded-xl, background to bg-slate-50, and focus ring to ring-slate-900/20

tables.style: Left-aligned for textual data, right-aligned for currency. Generous py-4 on cells. Hover states on rows (bg-slate-50/50).

charts.style: Use Recharts. Remove default heavy grid lines (use strokeDasharray='3 3' stroke='#f1f5f9'). Use #059669 for income series and #DC2626 for expense series.

motion.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-up for bento grid children.

login_hero_background.description: Minimalist abstract geometric background for the login screen. Soft slate blue and emerald intersections.
login_hero_background.usage: Use as a full-bleed background for the login page, overlaid with a glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/60) login card.

abstract_accent_1.usage: Optional: use inside the 'Settings' or 'Profile' header banner with a dark overlay.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, size 20px for body, 24px for headers.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React .js syntax, not .tsx. Avoid TypeScript typings.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the Dashboard using Tailwind subgrid or direct children.
Do not use native <input type='date'>, use Shadcn DatePicker/Calendar.
Do not use generic HTML <select>, use Shadcn Select component.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, specific table rows) using kebab-case role-based names.
Ensure all currency is formatted in Philippine Peso (₱).
Build the dashboard metrics, recent transactions, and expense vs income charts using the defined color palette.
